## Description

Brief description of the skill being added or modified.

## Skill Information

- **Skill Name**: `skill-name`
- **Category**: (e.g., backend, frontend, devops, testing)
- **Use Case**: Primary scenarios where this skill is useful

## Checklist

- [ ] Skill name follows naming conventions (`^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$`)
- [ ] Directory name matches skill name in SKILL.md
- [ ] YAML frontmatter is valid and complete
- [ ] Description is 1-1024 characters
- [ ] Instructions are clear and actionable
- [ ] Tested with at least one AI agent
- [ ] Validation script passes (if included)
- [ ] `pnpm run lint` passes
- [ ] No sensitive information included

## Testing

Describe how you tested this skill:
- [ ] Tested with Claude Code
- [ ] Tested with Cursor
- [ ] Tested with [other agent]

## Screenshots/Examples (Optional)

Include examples of the skill in action, if applicable.

## Additional Notes

Any additional context or notes for reviewers.
